hero.title: Creativity meets strategy
hero.subtitle: I use data-driven strategies to automate marketing and maximize impact.

about.label: About me
about.title: Who am I, actually?
about.subtitle: Here I show with a wink why I'm the marketeer you're looking for.
about.p1: As a marketeer I believe in one thing: goodbye repetitive tasks, hello automation! Why do manually what can be done smarter and faster? With my experience in CRM systems, social media marketing, automation and email marketing, I help businesses grow without getting stuck in time-consuming processes.
about.p2: My work style? I'm a hands-on go-getter who thinks along with entrepreneurs and doesn't believe in a standard 9-to-5 mentality. I love efficiency, but I'm also a team player with humor. Because let's be honest, marketing is serious enough without a laugh now and then.
about.p3: I've worked with tools like HubSpot, Pipedrive, Google Analytics, SEMrush, ActiveCampaign, Zapier and much more. So yes, I'm quite technical and love diving into data to optimize marketing processes.
about.p4: Besides marketing and automation, I'm also committed to something bigger. With my initiative Baraka4Gambia I help the most disadvantaged people in Gambia by collecting clothing and raising money for food packages.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: What I've built
projects.subtitle: Side projects where marketing meets code.

paywatch.title: PayWatch.app
paywatch.description: AI-powered bill tracker for Dutch households. Scans invoices with Gemini AI, tracks payment deadlines, and prevents debt escalation.
paywatch.problem: Many Dutch households lose track of bills, leading to unnecessary debt collector fees and stress.
paywatch.solution: Built a full-stack app that uses AI to extract bill data from PDFs, tracks deadlines, and sends smart reminders.
paywatch.learned: Learned to integrate multiple AI models, build production auth flows with Supabase, and handle sensitive financial data responsibly.
paywatch.tech: Next.js 16 · Supabase · Sanity CMS · Gemini AI · Claude Haiku · Resend

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: I bring a combination of data-driven marketing, automation, and a hands-on mentality. I think along with entrepreneurs, work efficiently, and always look for smart solutions. I have experience in both B2B and B2C marketing.
faq.q2: How far are you willing to travel?
faq.a2: I live in Rotterdam. By car up to 1 hour, by public transport up to 1.5 hours. Travel time is no problem for the right opportunity.
faq.q3: What do you value on the work floor?
faq.a3: A good atmosphere, growth opportunities, and an environment where entrepreneurship and initiative are valued.
faq.q4: How much do you expect to earn?
faq.a4: My salary indication is between €3,800 and €4,500 gross per month, depending on the responsibilities. I'm always open to discussion.
faq.q5: Do you prefer office or remote?
faq.a5: I'm flexible! I prefer hybrid. Office for teamwork and collaboration, remote for maximum focus and productivity.
faq.a6: It started during my finals when I launched my own webshop. Everything around marketing I had to figure out myself. And I loved it. Since then I've grown into automation, lead generation, and CRM systems.
faq.a7: I was born in Gambia and moved to the Netherlands when I was 9. My background shaped me into a hard worker with an international perspective.
faq.a8: Feedback is an opportunity to learn and improve. I'm open to constructive criticism and find it important to continuously grow.

contact.label: Get in touch

playground_page.flow_subtitle: This is how I design subscriber journeys. Trigger → nurture → convert. Watch the simulation run through both paths.
playground_page.roi_subtitle: The question I always get: "What's the ROI?" Play with the numbers yourself.
playground_page.sql_subtitle: I write queries like these daily at Samba Energy for marketing campaigns. Try the presets or write your own. The results might surprise you.
playground_page.dashboard_subtitle: The kind of dashboard I check every morning. These are fictional numbers, but the patterns are real.
playground_page.sql_showcase_subtitle: How I turn marketing goals into code. Toggle between the business ask and the technical solution.
playground_page.ab_subtitle: Think you can pick the winning subject line? Test your marketing instincts against real campaign data.
playground_page.funnel_subtitle: Adjust conversion rates at each stage and see how small improvements compound into big revenue changes.
playground_page.analyzer_subtitle: Paste any email subject line and get instant AI-powered feedback on what works and what doesn't.
